texto: Well, if you don’t like the idea of one world, how many worlds do you want, and how would you like them divided? By race? By religion? By income? Unless you have a spare planet in your pocket, one world is all we have.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Burl Barer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Well, if you don’t like the idea of one world, how many worlds do you want, and how would you lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, vida, world pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de world.
